title: Iron Farm
description: Produces iron by exploiting villager panic and an iron golem spawn. Core: a small cell holding several villagers, with a 'zombie' (held in a side cell behind a trapdoor or glass so it scares the villagers without reaching them). Frightened villagers near beds trigger an iron golem to spawn on a marked spawn platform below. The golem falls or is pushed by water into a kill chamber — a drop high enough to leave it at low health, then lava blades or a player finishes it. Hoppers under the kill chamber funnel iron and poppies into a chest. Needs villagers, beds, a contained zombie, water streams for golem transport, and a hopper collection floor.
